title: Windows RDP Lateral Movement
description: Detects use of mstsc.exe (Remote Desktop client) or enabling RDP via registry, indicating potential lateral movement between systems.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*mstsc.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*/v:*') or ('Process Name' like '*reg.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*fDenyTSConnections*'))
falsepositives: IT administrators using RDP for legitimate remote management
